name: Chicken Curry (Taste Show)
recipeIngredient: 2 3-pound chickens, cut into serving-size pieces, skinned
1 tablespoon ground roasted cumin seeds or ground cumin
recipeInstructions:
1. In a large heavy-bottomed pan, preferably with a nonstick surface, heat 2 tablespoons oil over high heat.
2. When the oil is very hot, add chicken, a few pieces at a time, and sear until browned on all sides, about 4 minutes. Using a slotted spoon, remove chicken to a plate and continue until all pieces are browned.
3. Add remaining oil and onions to the pan. Reduce heat to medium-high and fry for 30 minutes until light brown, stirring constantly to prevent burning.
4. Add garlic and ginger and fry for 5 minutes. Add cinnamon and cardamom and fry for 2 minutes, until spices are puffed and beginning to brown.
5. Add turmeric and cayenne and stir rapidly for 15 seconds.
6. Return chicken to the pan and stir in tomatoes, salt, and 2 cups boiling water. Reduce heat to a simmer, cover, and cook about 45 minutes until the chicken is tender and the gravy has thickened.
7. Check frequently, adding a little water if the sauce is evaporating too quickly.
8. Turn off heat and let dish rest, covered at least 1 hour, preferably 2.
9. When ready to serve, reheat, fold in cumin and cilantro, and adjust seasonings if needed.
Yield: 8 servings
